message:
refactor(runtime): complete ContendedMutex migration in scheduler unit tests

Migrate remaining Arc<Mutex<RuntimeState>> usages in inline unit tests
to Arc<ContendedMutex<RuntimeState>>:

- scheduler/mod.rs: test_worker_shutdown
- scheduler/three_lane.rs: 40+ test functions covering scheduler creation,
  worker shutdown, cancel priority, fairness limits, stealing, task
  execution, timer driver propagation, dedup, wake distribution, governor,
  preemption metrics, fast queues, local ready, backoff, and waiter routing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
